argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const res = await fetch('https://public.api.bsky.app/xrpc/app.bsky.feed.getAuthorFeed?actor={{ handle }}&limit={{ limit }}'); const data = await res.json(); return (data?.feed || []).slice(0, {{ limit }}).map((item, i) => ({ rank: i + 1, text: item.post?.record?.text || '', likes: item.post?.likeCount || 0, reposts: item.post?.repostCount || 0, replies: item.post?.replyCount || 0 })); }

description: Get recent posts from a Bluesky user
name: User
